query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sku 
FROM products p 
WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK';

SELECT pv.id, pv.productId, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName, p.sku as productSku
FROM product_variants pv
JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK';
